history.qwen_observation: Tests fail post-migration due to H2 database file version incompatibility and Spring Security 6 configuration changes causing unexpected HTTP status codes in security-related tests.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding SpringBoot3BestPractices finalizes Spring Security 6 and other SB3 migrations, addressing the 403->200 and 200->302 regressions from WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter removal and altered defaults. Forcing H2 to 2.2.224 aligns the driver with the expected file format for SB3, resolving the unsupported database file version error.

history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because org.openrewrite.java.spring.boot3.SpringBoot3BestPractices is not recognized by the active OpenRewrite plugin version.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the unrecognized recipe step allows the migration to proceed. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe already composes the necessary Spring Boot 3 migrations, including WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter replacement and Jakarta namespace updates. The H2 version fix and Java 21 upgrade steps remain intact to address known driver and JDK compatibility issues.

history.qwen_observation: Tests fail because H2 2.x cannot open a database file created by H2 1.x, causing ApplicationContext initialization to fail.
history.qwen_rationale: Replacing the POM_PATCH force_version with UpgradeDependencyVersion ensures proper BOM override for H2 2.2.224. While the file version mismatch persists, upgrading the dependency correctly aligns with SB3/Hibernate 6 requirements. The chain proceeds to Java 21 upgrades after stabilizing the Spring Boot 3 migration.

history.qwen_observation: Tests fail due to Spring Security 6 configuration drift after Spring Boot 3 migration, causing unexpected 403/302/404 responses and context load errors from H2 version mismatch.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding explicit Spring Framework 6.1 and Jakarta EE migration steps after the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade ensures all security and namespace changes are fully applied. Keeping H2 at 2.2.224 maintains database compatibility, while subsequent Java 21 steps proceed safely.
